response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production settings, including recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong software craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing libraries authored) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) round out the profile. Gaps are mostly framework-specific — no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright exposure — but these are learnable given the depth elsewhere.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple production platforms, well beyond the 6-year bar
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matching the required AI agent development experience
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops and courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated/limited relative to secondary stack needs
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly listed despite broad testing background
